name: Desert Metals Limited
summary: Desert Metals Limited explores for mineral properties in Australia. The company primarily explores for nickel, copper, gold, lead, zinc, and platinum group elements deposits. It owns interest in the Narryer project that includes nine granted contiguous exploration licenses covering an area of approximately 1,665 square kilometers located in the Mid-West region of Western Australia. The company was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Perth, Australia.
